Identifiers of one (or more) supply organization for direct-to-supplier
matching.

id.description:
The ID of the bundle. Referred to as `shift_id` when retrieving the offer
in all other contexts.

OutboxOfferCollectionResponse.description: API response of an offer on the outbox API.

modified_at.description: The creation or last update of the offer or any responses to it.

sent.description: The number of recipients to whom the offer was sent.

direct_supply_persona_ids.description:
Identifiers of one (or more) supply organization for direct-to-supplier
matching.

OutboxOfferMatchCollectionResponse.description: API response for the representation of Offer Matches on the outbox API.

InboxOfferCollectionResponse.description: API response for the core representation of an offer response on the inbox API.

InboxReferralCollectionResponse.description: API response for the core representation of a referral response on the inbox API.

InboxOfferCore.description:
Core representation of an offer on the inbox API.
Meant to be used in the nested `offer` in a top level (API) response schema.

InboxOfferDetailResponse.description:
API response for the anonymous representation of an offer on the inbox API.
Similarly to the `InboxOfferCore`, this schema is meant to be used in the nested `offer`
in a top level (API) response schema, e.g. the `InboxOfferScalarApiResponse`
This includes everything from the `InboxOfferCore` along with some additional information
on the client, service and visits.
Not all client information is included here, hence the "anon" (anonymous) prefix.

OfferMatchCore.description:
Core representation of an Offer Match.
Meant to be used in the nested `match` in a top level (API) response schema.

OfferReasonCodeCore.description: `reason_code` and `reason_comment` associated to a cancelled or closed offer.

OfferMatchReasonCodeCore.description: `reason_code` associated with a declined Offer Match.

rate.description: The dollar amount for offer per unit.

PageCore.description: Root page schema for returning collections.

use_client_address.description:
For informational purposes only. This is an explicit indicator to the
supply organization whether the client address should be used as the
service address.

Setting to `true` means the client address should be used for the
service address. So, if a service address is also provided in the
request, it can safely be ignored.

Not providing this or setting to `false` means the specified
service address should be used instead.

TakeRateCore.description:
A percentage of the offer price set by demand, represented by a fraction
between 0 and 1. For example, a regional take rate of 0.1 is 10%.

supply_persona_id.description: The supply organization to which the referral is destined.

request, it can safely be ignored.

Not providing this or setting to `false` means the specified
service address should be used instead.

SysAdminReferralCollectionResponse.description: API response of an referral on the outbox API.

OutboxReferralCollectionResponse.description: API response of an referral on the outbox API.

InboxReferralDetailResponse.description:
API response for the complete representation of an assigned referral on the inbox API.
This schema is similar to the `InboxAnonReferral` except that it includes the complete
representation of the referral instead of the anonymous representation.

ReferralReasonCodeCore.description: `reason_code` associated to a cancelled or closed referral.
